dashboard.subtitle: Keep learning today
dashboard.noPendingSelected: No pending words in selected boxes
dashboard.boxHint: Click a box to view its words · check/uncheck to filter review
dashboard.wordsOnlyDesc: Excludes entries with more than 2 words
dashboard.simulateDesc: Simulate day randomly redistributes your words across the 7 boxes with a realistic mix of pending items for today.
dashboard.resetDesc: Reset returns everything to box 0 with immediate review.

settings.title: Settings
settings.simpleModeDesc: One round. Each word is practiced once with a random exercise type.
settings.safeModeDesc: 3 full rounds. All words go through each round before advancing. Phrases always use multiple choice.
settings.exercisePerRoundDesc: Choose which exercise type to use in each round for short words (≤2 words). Phrases always use multiple choice.
settings.wordsPerSessionSafe: In safe mode, up to {{count}} exercises will be done per session.
settings.wordsPerSessionSimple: Up to {{count}} words will be loaded per session.
settings.autoPlayAudioDesc: Pronounces the word when each exercise loads (multiple choice and write).
settings.autoPlayAudioReversedDesc: Pronounces the meaning when the question goes meaning → word.
settings.useTtsInAudioReviewDesc: Generate missing clips with speech synthesis and include words without MP3.
settings.ttsRateDesc: Speed of text-to-speech synthesis (0.5× slow — 2.0× fast).
settings.ttsNoVoices: No voices available on this system
settings.ttsFiltersDesc: Regex patterns stripped from text before speech synthesis. One pattern per line, # for comments.
settings.ttsFiltersDefault: Showing default filters (no custom override yet)
settings.ttsFiltersHint: One regex per line. Lines starting with # are comments. Patterns are applied in order.
settings.leoAutoFetchDesc: When you apply a LEO result, automatically fetch translations in the selected languages and save them with the word.
settings.ollamaNotDetected: Ollama is not running. Start it with: ollama serve
settings.ollamaTimeoutDesc: Maximum seconds to wait for an Ollama response (10–300)
settings.ollamaPromptsDesc: Leave blank to use the built-in prompt. Use {variable} to insert dynamic values.
settings.audioReviewExtraLangs: Include extra languages in audio review
settings.audioReviewExtraLangsDesc: Adds fetched extra-language translations as audio segments in the generated MP3.
settings.videoClipsDesc: Player settings for subtitle video clips.
settings.videoClipAutoPlayDesc: Play all clips in sequence and loop back to the start.
settings.videoClipPauseDesc: Seconds to wait between one clip and the next.
settings.videoClipContextDesc: Subtitle lines to show before and after the current clip (0 = current only).
settings.maxRefsPerWordDesc: Maximum number of video clips to store per word (1–50).
settings.subtitleIndexFieldsDesc: Which word fields are used to search subtitles when regenerating references.
settings.subtitleIndexFieldsHint: Applied on the next reference regeneration.
settings.wordsOnlyDesc: Excludes entries with more than 2 words from review, list and stats.
settings.transitionButton: A button appears to continue to the next exercise.
settings.leitnerBoxDaysDesc: Days to wait before a word becomes due for review again, based on its box.
settings.themesDesc: Manage themes to classify your words.
settings.reviewDirectionDesc: Choose whether questions go from word to meaning, the other way around, or randomly in both directions.
settings.direction_forwardDesc: The source word is the prompt; the meaning is the answer.
settings.direction_reverseDesc: The meaning is the prompt; the source word is the answer.
settings.direction_bothDesc: Each question randomly picks which direction to ask.
settings.paginationDesc: Available quantities when paginating the word list. Must be distinct and in ascending order.

profile.title: Profile
profile.notificationsEmailDesc: Receive a summary of pending words in each box.
profile.notificationsPushDesc: Receive device alerts with pending words.
profile.darkModeDesc: Use dark theme throughout the application.

words.title: Vocabulary
words.noWords: No words yet. Add the first one!
words.videoRefsNone: No clips available for this word
words.videoNoYoutubeId: No YouTube ID — cannot show video
words.bulkAssignTemaDesc: Theme will be assigned to the {{count}} filtered words.

import.title: Import vocabulary
import.description: Upload a file exported from Google Translate (.csv or .xlsx) or from Vocabox. Vocabox files restore the box and review date for each word. Words you already have will be detected and skipped.
import.pdfDescription: Import a PDF exported from LEO Dictionary's Vokabeltrainer. Word pairs are extracted automatically.
import.importedNote: New words are in box 0 and ready to review.
import.subtitlesDesc: Upload YouTube subtitles (.vtt, .srt) to find video clips for your words.
import.subtitleYoutubeIdHint: Auto-detected from filename if it contains [VIDEO_ID]
import.subtitleDeleteConfirm: Delete this subtitle and its clip references?
import.subtitleDeleteAllRefsDesc: Removes word-to-clip links but keeps subtitle files.
import.subtitleReindexDesc: Searches all your words in subtitles and creates references per word, prioritising different files.
import.subtitleReindexMinRefsHint: Only words with fewer than {{n}} reference(s)
import.subtitleSearchDesc: Search a word or phrase across all your subtitles and open the matching clips.

wordEdit.title: Edit word
wordEdit.splitMismatch: {{words}} words and {{meanings}} meanings — counts must match.

session.settingsChanged: Settings changed. Start a new session to apply them.

motivational.text: Übung macht den Meister — practice makes perfect!
Wer rastet, der rostet. Keep going — never stop!
Ein Land, eine Sprache — and you're mastering more than one!
C'est en forgeant qu'on devient forgeron. You're forging your fluency!
Vouloir c'est pouvoir. You're proving it right now!
Chi va piano va sano e va lontano. Step by step, you'll get there.
Ogni lingua è una visione del mondo — and you're expanding yours!
A língua é a alma de um povo — and you're speaking their language!
Every word learned is a door opened. Keep going!
Practice makes perfect — and you're proving it!
Repetitio est mater studiorum — repetition is the mother of learning.
Fantastic! Vocabulary is built one word at a time.

audioReview.title: Review audio
audioReview.completeWithTtsDesc: If the existing MP3 was recorded with less text than the current entry, the missing part will be appended via TTS.
audioReview.extraLangsNone: None configured — set them in Settings
audioReview.noEligibleWords: No words with both audio tracks
audioReview.errorGenerate: Error generating audio. Make sure ffmpeg is installed on the server.
